airport.name: Guangzhou Baiyun International Airport
airport.toCity: Take Metro Line 3 or airport express bus. Taxis are available; use metered ones.

transport.metro: Get a Yangcheng Tong card for easy metro access. Signs are in English and Chinese.
transport.taxi: Use metered taxis; apps like Amap or Didi for convenience. Avoid unlicensed cabs.
transport.didi: Download Didi app; link international card or use Alipay. Cash payment option available.
tips: Always carry small change for buses.
Avoid rush hours for comfortable travel.
Learn basic Chinese phrases for directions.

payment.alipay: Download Alipay app and register with passport. Link international card for top-ups.
payment.wechatPay: Set up WeChat Pay via passport verification. Use for payments in most places.
payment.cash: Carry small amounts of cash; some small vendors prefer cash.
payment.foreignCard: Visa and Mastercard accepted in hotels, upscale restaurants. Inform bank before travel.

tips: Book in advance during peak seasons.
Check for English-speaking staff at hotels.
Try street food but ensure it's freshly cooked.
Use translation apps for menu items.

commonScams: Tai Chi or tea ceremony scams near attractions.

emergency.localTip: In case of emergency, ask locals for help; most are friendly and assist tourists.

bestTimeToVisit: October to December for mild weather and fewer crowds.
touristTips: Learn a few basic Chinese phrases.
Always have hotel address in Chinese.
Use hotel cards to get back safely.
Stay hydrated and carry a water bottle.
